name: gitforge-mcp
description: Git & GitHub MCP: version control as a craft, everything included. Git the tool (the three trees, branching, merge-vs-rebase, undo & recovery via reflog/reset/revert/restore, history archaeology with log/blame/bisect, conflicts & stash, the object model, team workflows) and GitHub the platform (repos/forks/pull-requests, Actions CI/CD, releases/tags/issues, the API & gh CLI, repository security). explain_topic/how_to/debug/myth_vs_reality plus check_practice → practice_verdict for the fast-moving GitHub surface. Runs as an asset under orchestrator-mcp.
